summary: Created hint registry (src/visual/hintRegistry.ts) as a single source of truth with 6 HintEntry items covering all 8 VisualParams keys and a compile-time completeness check. Replaced the p3 paragraph in the info overlay with a structured <ul class='eavi-hints'> list populated from INFLUENCE_HINTS. Added CSS styles for .eavi-hints, .eavi-hints li, and .eavi-hint-category. Updated 2 existing US-022 tests (visitor context regex and 500-char budget) to account for the structural change. Added 9 unit tests for the registry and 8 integration tests for hint rendering in the overlay. All 218 tests pass and build succeeds.
